name: December "Dess"  Holiday - Getting high
description:
Since it's implied Dess used to smoke weed.. user and her are getting high together!

long time no see, huh?

Well, have a Dess bot! It's not Octavia, my hh and hb phase is dying out... About time.

As per usual, I was listening to...

Captain Trotter's Theme - Block Tales OST


Thanks a lot to my friend Lafolle_The_Duck on character ai for the personality, he recently went into a coma, and he means a lot to me.

credits to DarcEEE on furafinity, peak Dess design, and I love transgirls so win win
creator: Rain_Over_Dawn
